title: Seedance 3.0 — NEW AI Video Generator Makes 1H+ Movies
summary: Seedance 2.0 is ranked at number one for audio-paired video generation on Artificial Analysis. A leaked Seedance 3.0 claims capabilities including 18-minute single-prompt movies, Narrative Memory Chain, MMDiT v2 upgrade, and 8x cost reduction.
writeup: A sourced breakdown of ByteDance's SeedDance video generation line, using the Artificial Analysis Video Arena leaderboard to establish SeedDance 2.0 as the current top-ranked audio-paired video model, then applying a credible/possible/unverified framework to a viral Chinese-language leak claiming SeedDance 3.0 will offer 18-minute generation, a narrative memory chain architecture, and 1/8 the cost of 2.0. The core argument is that the incumbents' legal and political response (Disney cease and desist, 400-actor open letter, bipartisan Senate pressure) is itself a reliable signal of genuine technical disruption, independent of any specific leak claim.
key_points: SeedDance 2.0 holds the top Elo score on the Artificial Analysis Video Arena in both text-to-video with audio (1,214) and image-to-video with audio (1,194), making it the strongest publicly ranked audio-paired video model; the only model that beats it is Alibaba's HaiPer (Happy Horse) 1.0, which leads the no-audio benchmarks at 1,293 and 1,294 respectively.

SeedDance's architectural differentiator is MM-DiT, a dual-branch diffusion transformer that co-generates audio and video in parallel rather than sequentially, which tightens audio sync and lowers cost per second compared to sequential pipelines like early Sora and VEO designs.

The SeedDance 3.0 leak originates from a single unverified Chinese-language account (@MokouCN, February 14, 2026) with no confirmed ByteDance affiliation; the author rates 18-minute generation and narrative memory chain as 'possible' (technically plausible given published ByteDance direction), the MM-DiT V2 upgrade as 'credible', and the 4K Hollywood-grade quality and specific June release date as 'unverified'.

SeedDance 2.0 currently costs roughly 1 yuan (about 14 cents) per second on Volcano Engine direct, or 5 to 20 cents per second through third-party aggregators such as Fal and Segmind; an 8x cost reduction to ~1.75 cents per second is the 3.0 claim that most alarmed Hollywood writers, but no ByteDance source has confirmed the number.

The near-term releases with better sourcing than the 3.0 leak are SeedDance 2.1 (reportedly a roughly 20% quality lift over 2.0) and SeedDance 2.0 mini (reportedly priced around 7.3 cents per second while beating 2.0 Fast on quality), both rumored for June 2026 and reported by Wave Speed and Pan Daily rather than a single anonymous account.

OpenAI's position in the video generation category has eroded sharply: Sora's consumer app shut down on April 26, 2026, and the API is set to sunset September 24, 2026, a concrete outcome for the model that launched the category.
